discrepancies.description: claude-chat repo docs/ directory is fully untracked in git (status returns ?? for all files including the master governance doc). The E3 amendment to siarc_project_instructions_v2026-05-14.md is therefore local-only on the operator workstation — not visible in any GitHub browser, not propagated via repo clones, not in CI scope.
discrepancies.resolution: Bridge-repo absorption of this session is the canonical external record. A copy of the post-amendment master doc was deposited at sessions/2026-05-14/E3-TIER-3A-3B-SPLIT-IMPLEMENTATION/siarc_project_instructions_v2026-05-14.md so the amendment is recoverable from the bridge regardless of claude-chat git scope. Operator may optionally remove docs/ from .gitignore (or explicitly add) if propagation via GitHub is desired; flagged in handoff.md anomaly 1.
